title: HPOM-010: Project quality standards template
description: Create templates/project-quality-standards.md supporting software, writing, research, design, and operations projects. Also create templates/review-checklist.md as a separate review tool.
acceptance_criteria: template has sections for: positive standards, anti-patterns, review checklist reference
template supports at least software and writing project types
review-checklist.md covers: scope check, criteria check, forbidden-changes check, files-reviewed list, risk identification, verdict
